# services.gitwatch

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gitwatch`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.gitwatch` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | A set of git repositories to watch for. See [gitwatch](https://github.com/gitwatch/gitwatch) for more. |
| `services.gitwatch.<name>.branch` | `null or string` | Optional branch in remote repository |
| `services.gitwatch.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable watching for repo. |
| `services.gitwatch.<name>.message` | `null or string` | Optional text to use in as commit message; all occurrences of `%d` will be replaced by formatted date/time |
| `services.gitwatch.<name>.path` | `string` | The path to repo in local machine |
| `services.gitwatch.<name>.remote` | `null or string` | Optional url of remote repository |
| `services.gitwatch.<name>.user` | `string` | The name of services's user |
